message:
feat: add town-level crew_agents for per-crew agent assignment

Adds CrewAgents map to TownSettings so named crew members can be assigned
specific agents at the town level without modifying each rig config.
Resolution: --agent flag > rig WorkerAgents > town CrewAgents > role agents > defaults.

Cherry-picked from PR #2527.

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
